form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at this track Bm78 on March 11 over 1100m, on a slow track; nose behind Our Queen carrying 60.5kg at $8. Before that 5th of 9 at Rosehill 3&4yo Bm78 on February 21 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Signor Tortoni carrying 59.5kg at $14. Racing well and cannot be discounted.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Returns from a 35-day let-up. Before that 5th of 9 at Rosehill 3&4yo Bm78 on February 21 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Signor Tortoni carrying 59.5kg at $14. Racing well and cannot be discounted.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded on jumping between Our Queen and Polyglot.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Held up for clear running from the 400m until passing the 250m.
Slow to begin. Laid inwards under pressure in the straight.
Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Colt returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Flemington in the G1 Coolmore Stud November 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tentyris carrying 57kg at $20. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.4 len Randwick LR Br Crowley October 25 over 1200m defeating Pallaton carrying 56kg at $6. Has the class to test this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-11.5). Colt returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Flemington in the G1 Coolmore Stud November 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tentyris carrying 57kg at $20. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.4 len Randwick LR Br Crowley October 25 over 1200m defeating Pallaton carrying 56kg at $6. Has the class to test this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped by Miss Freelove.
On jumping, shifted ground.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Gold Coast Sunlight Consol January 10 over 1100m defeating Torque To Be Sure carrying 55kg at $2.60. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 8 at Canterbury F&M Bm72 on September 17 over 1100m, neck behind Miss Trentino with 56.5kg at $4.20. Won trial at Randwick over 1050m on March 27. Sure to be right in the thick of things.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resuming. Finished off last preparation favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Gold Coast Sunlight Consol January 10 over 1100m defeating Torque To Be Sure carrying 55kg at $2.60. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 8 at Canterbury F&M Bm72 on September 17 over 1100m, neck behind Miss Trentino with 56.5kg at $4.20. Won trial at Randwick over 1050m on March 27. Sure to be right in the thick of things.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly.
Shifted in on jumping and bumped Quein Step. At the start, shifted in.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Randwick Cg&E Bm78 November 1 over 1300m, soft track; 6 len behind Midnight Dynamite with 58kg at $2.20. On debut second of 7 at Wyong Mdn June 8 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Sapphire Rose with 59kg at $2.80. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). He is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. On debut second of 7 at Wyong Mdn June 8 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Sapphire Rose with 59kg at $2.80. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in shortly after the start and bumped Editing.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd in a small field at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1150m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hay Street carrying 59kg at $3.50. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Flemington Bm84 on March 7 over 1100m, 4 len behind Verdoux with 56.5kg at $6.50. Cherry ripe and is one of the chief contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Last start 3rd in a small field at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1150m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hay Street carrying 59kg at $3.50. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Flemington Bm84 on March 7 over 1100m, 4 len behind Verdoux with 56.5kg at $6.50. Cherry ripe and is one of the chief contenders.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Rosehill Bm88 December 7 over 1100m, a long neck behind Hawker Hall carrying 52kg at $2.60. First up last campaign second of 8 at this track Bm72 October 22 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Lyles carrying 55kg at $6. Must be given some hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. First up last campaign second of 8 at this track Bm72 October 22 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Lyles carrying 55kg at $6. Must be given some hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced very wide without cover for the majority of the event.
Shortly after the start, shifted in.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at this track Bm72 October 22 over 1000m, 6 len behind Lyles with 60.5kg at $5.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Hawkesbury Cg&E Bm64 September 25 over 1100m defeating Sumo Star carrying 60kg at $2.40. Not out of contention.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at this track Bm72 October 22 over 1000m, 6 len behind Lyles with 60.5kg at $5.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Hawkesbury Cg&E Bm64 September 25 over 1100m defeating Sumo Star carrying 60kg at $2.40. Not out of contention.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to lay out when placed under pressure rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 10 at Wyong Bm72 on March 18 over 1200m, slow going nose behind Caesar with 57kg at $41. The race before that sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Canterbury Bm78 Final on February 27 over 1100m, slow going 4 len behind Bev's Nine with 54kg at $16. Likely to struggle against this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). At the latest run 2nd of 10 at Wyong Bm72 on March 18 over 1200m, slow going nose behind Caesar with 57kg at $41. The race before that sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Canterbury Bm78 Final on February 27 over 1100m, slow going 4 len behind Bev's Nine with 54kg at $16. Likely to struggle against this line-up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming won by 1.1 len at Canberra Open March 8 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Panic with 59.5kg at $1.50. Last start rolled along in front then was edged out late 3rd of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; neck behind Fine Vintage carrying 57kg at $7. In rare form and another big run looks on the cards.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today. Resuming won by 1.1 len at Canberra Open March 8 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Panic with 59.5kg at $1.50. Last start rolled along in front then was edged out late 3rd of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; neck behind Fine Vintage carrying 57kg at $7. In rare form and another big run looks on the cards.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over the concluding stages, shifted out under pressure.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.5 len at Randwick Kensington Bm78 March 25 over 1150m in soft going defeating Grand Prairie carrying 53kg at $2.60. Before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw February 25 over 1200m defeating Maidoff carrying 58.5kg at $1.55. SCRATCHED.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Mandraki.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 16 at Rosehill in the G3 St Kingdom on March 28 over 1200m, slow going 12 len behind Roselyn's Star with 54kg at $201. The race before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at Albury City Hcp Bm94 on March 19 over 1175m, slow going 1.0 len behind Bon Holler carrying 57.5kg at $17. Cannot see him bothering these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 150m, steadied from the heels of Ready To Shine.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and made contact with Angel Capital.
Passing the 950m, shifted in when insufficiently clear of Vella Fox.
Shifted out on jumping.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Randwick 3yo Bm72 December 20 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Plaintiff carrying 57.5kg at $12. Previously first up; second in a small field at Randwick Kensington Super 3yo C&G Mdn August 13 over 1150m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Sixties carrying 59kg at $3.60. SCRATCHED.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted in and bumped Crepe Myrtle losing ground.
Near the 350m, shifted out to obtain clear running.
Shifted out under pressure over the final 100m.
